tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most results are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly low fasting glucose, low total CO₂ (suggesting possible mild metabolic acidosis or compensation), elevated LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Recommend clinical correlation for metabolic status and consideration of lipid management. No evidence of renal dysfunction.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction

line.value: Calle de los Donantes de Sangre 3
